# edgenext_cdn_domain_config (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config` (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Domain configuration items (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config))
- `domain` (String) Accelerated domain name for setting functions
- `type` (String) Domain type: page(web), download(download), video_demand(video on demand), dynamic(dynamic)

### Optional

- `area` (String) Acceleration area: mainland_china(China mainland), outside_mainland_china(outside China mainland), global(global)

### Read-Only

- `cname` (String) CNAME
- `create_time` (String) Creation time
- `https` (Number) HTTPS
- `icp_num` (String) ICP filing number
- `icp_status` (String) ICP filing status
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String) Domain status
- `update_time` (String) Update time

<a id="nestedblock--config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config`

Optional:

- `add_back_source_head` (Block List) Add origin request headers (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--add_back_source_head))
- `add_response_head` (Block List, Max: 1) Add response headers (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--add_response_head))
- `cache_rule` (Block List) Cache rule list (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--cache_rule))
- `cache_rule_list` (Block List) New cache rules (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--cache_rule_list))
- `cache_share` (Block List, Max: 1) Shared cache (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--cache_share))
- `compress_response` (Block List, Max: 1) Compress response (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--compress_response))
- `connect_timeout` (Block List, Max: 1) Origin connection timeout (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--connect_timeout))
- `deny_url` (Block List, Max: 1) Block illegal URLs (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--deny_url))
- `head_control` (Block List, Max: 1) HTTP header control (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--head_control))
- `https` (Block List, Max: 1) HTTPS configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--https))
- `ip_black_list` (Block List, Max: 1) IP blacklist (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--ip_black_list))
- `ip_white_list` (Block List, Max: 1) IP whitelist (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--ip_white_list))
- `origin` (Block List, Max: 1) Origin configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--origin))
- `origin_host` (Block List, Max: 1) Origin HOST (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--origin_host))
- `rate_limit` (Block List, Max: 1) Rate limit (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--rate_limit))
- `referer` (Block List, Max: 1) Referer blacklist and whitelist (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--referer))
- `speed_limit` (Block List) Speed limit (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--speed_limit))
- `timeout` (Block List, Max: 1) Origin read timeout (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--timeout))

<a id="nestedblock--config--add_back_source_head"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.add_back_source_head`

Required:

- `head_name` (String) Origin request header name, maximum 20 can be added
- `head_value` (String) Origin request header value

Optional:

- `write_when_exists` (String) Whether to overwrite when the same request header exists 
yes: Overwrite 
no: Do not overwrite 
Default value is yes when not specified.


<a id="nestedblock--config--add_response_head"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.add_response_head`

Optional:

- `list` (Block List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--add_response_head--list))
- `type` (String) Response header setting mode: 
reset: Reset to the response headers set this time 
add: Append the response headers set this time. If the appended response header key exists, overwrite the original response header. 
remove: Delete response headers. 
Default value is reset when not specified.

<a id="nestedblock--config--add_response_head--list"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.add_response_head.list`

Required:

- `name` (String) Response header name
- `value` (String) Response header value



<a id="nestedblock--config--cache_rule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.cache_rule`

Required:

- `pattern` (String) Cache rules, multiple separated by commas. For example: 
When type=1: jpg,png,gif 
When type=2: /product/index,/test/index,/user/index 
When type=3: /index.html,/test/*.jpg,/user/get?index 
When type=4: see below for examples, set the corresponding regex. After setting regex, the request URL is matched against the regex, and if matched, this cache rule is used. 
Default is cached with parameters, ignoring expiration time, not ignoring no-cache headers
- `time` (Number) Cache time, used with timeunit, maximum time not exceeding 2 years, when time=0 no caching for specified pattern
- `type` (Number) Cache type: 1(file extension), 2(directory), 3(full path matching), 4(regex)

Optional:

- `ignore_expired` (String) Valid when cache time is greater than 0, ignore origin server expiration time, default value is on, optional parameters: on,off
- `ignore_no_cache` (String) Valid when cache time is greater than 0, ignore origin server no-cache headers, default value is off, optional parameters: on,off
- `ignore_query` (String) Valid when cache time is greater than 0, ignore parameters for caching and ignore parameters for origin requests, default value is off, optional parameters: on,off
- `timeunit` (String) Cache time unit, default value is s, optional values are (Y year, M month, D day, h hour, i minute, s second)


<a id="nestedblock--config--cache_rule_list"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.cache_rule_list`

Required:

- `expire` (Number) Cache time, used with expire_unit, maximum time not exceeding 2 years. When time=0, no caching for the specified pattern (i.e., caching disabled)
- `match_method` (String) Cache type, ext: file extension, dir: directory, route: full path matching, regex: regular expression
- `pattern` (String) Cache rules, multiple separated by commas. For example: when type=ext: jpg,png,gif; when type=dir: /product/index,/test/index,/user/index; when type=route: /index.html,/test/*.jpg,/user/get?index; when type=regex: set the corresponding regex as described below. After setting regex, the request URL is matched against the regex, and if matched, this cache rule is used. Default is cached with parameters, ignoring expiration time, not ignoring no-cache headers

Optional:

- `case_ignore` (String) Whether to ignore case, yes to ignore, no to not ignore. Default is yes
- `expire_unit` (String) Cache time unit, default value is s, optional values are (Y year, M month, D day, h hour, i minute, s second)
- `follow_expired` (String) Whether to follow origin server cache time, default value is no, optional parameters: no,yes
- `ignore_no_cache_headers` (String) Whether to ignore no-cache information in origin server response headers<br/>such as Cache-Control:no-cache, default value is no, optional parameters: no,yes
- `params` (String) Only takes effect when query_params_op=customer, parameter list
- `priority` (Number) Sort value, lower priority value means higher priority, duplicates are not allowed
- `query_params_op` (String) Query parameter operation mode, default value is no, optional parameters: no,yes,customer
- `query_params_op_way` (String) Only takes effect when query_params_op=customer, optional values: keep: retain, remove: remove
- `query_params_op_when` (String) Only takes effect when query_params_op=customer, optional values: cache: only process during caching, cache_back_source: process both caching and origin requests


<a id="nestedblock--config--cache_share"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.cache_share`

Required:

- `domain` (String) Required field, domain to be shared, this item only takes effect when share_way is cross_single_share and cross_all_share
- `share_way` (String) Required field, sharing method, value range: [inner_share,cross_single_share,cross_all_share] 
inner_share: HTTP and HTTPS share cache within this domain; 
cross_single_share: HTTP and HTTPS separately share cache between different domains 
cross_all_share: HTTP and HTTPS all share cache between different domains


<a id="nestedblock--config--compress_response"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.compress_response`

Required:

- `content_type` (List of String) Corresponding headers, e.g.: ['text/plain','application/x-javascript']
- `min_size` (Number) Minimum size, used with min_size_unit, indicates the minimum file size to start compression
- `min_size_unit` (String) Minimum size unit, optional values are (KB,MB) note: this parameter is required when min_size=0


<a id="nestedblock--config--connect_timeout"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.connect_timeout`

Required:

- `origin_connect_timeout` (String) Required field, origin connection timeout duration, unit s, value range: [5-60]


<a id="nestedblock--config--deny_url"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.deny_url`

Required:

- `urls` (List of String) Required field, blocked URL list


<a id="nestedblock--config--head_control"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.head_control`

Required:

- `list` (Block List, Min: 1) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config--head_control--list))

<a id="nestedblock--config--head_control--list"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.head_control.list`

Required:

- `head` (String) Required field, HTTP header name
- `head_direction` (String) Required field, direction, value range: [CLI_REQ,CLI_REP,SER_REQ,SER_REP]; CLI_REQ: client request header; CLI_REP: client response header; SER_REQ: origin request header; SER_REP: origin response header;
- `head_op` (String) Required field, operation content, value range: [ADD,DEL,ALT]; ADD: add; DEL: delete; ALT: modify;
- `order` (Number) Required field, priority
- `regex` (String) Required field, matching URL
- `value` (String) Required field, header value



<a id="nestedblock--config--https"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.https`

Required:

- `cert_id` (Number) Specify the bound certificate ID, which can be obtained through the certificate query interface. 
When cert_id=0, HTTPS service will be disabled for the domain.

Optional:

- `force_https` (String) Redirect HTTP requests to HTTPS protocol 
0: No redirect 
302: HTTP request 302 redirect to HTTPS request 
301: HTTP request 301 redirect to HTTPS request 
Default value is 0 when not specified.
- `http2` (String) HTTP2 feature: 
on: Enable 
off: Disable
- `ocsp` (String) OCSP[on,off] 
No change when not specified
- `ssl_protocol` (List of String) Value range: [TLSv1,TLSv1.1,TLSv1.2,TLSv1.3]


<a id="nestedblock--config--ip_black_list"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.ip_black_list`

Required:

- `list` (List of String) IP blacklist. IP format supports /8, /16, /24 subnet formats, IPs between subnets cannot overlap; maximum 500 IP formats can be set, multiple IP formats separated by commas; IP blacklist cannot coexist with IP whitelist, setting IP blacklist will clear IP whitelist functionality.


<a id="nestedblock--config--ip_white_list"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.ip_white_list`

Required:

- `list` (List of String) IP whitelist. IP format supports /8, /16, /24 subnet formats, IPs between subnets cannot overlap; maximum 500 IP formats can be set, multiple IP formats separated by commas; IP whitelist cannot coexist with IP blacklist, setting IP whitelist will clear IP blacklist functionality.


<a id="nestedblock--config--origin"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.origin`

Optional:

- `default_master` (String) Primary origin address, can fill multiple IPs or one domain name.
Multiple IPs separated by comma(,); primary and backup origins cannot have same IP or domain name.
- `default_slave` (String) Backup origin address, can fill multiple IPs or one domain name.
Multiple IPs separated by comma(,); primary and backup origins cannot have same IP or domain name.
- `ori_https` (String) This value needs to be set when origin_mode=custom. 
HTTPS protocol origin: 
yes: Yes 
no: No
- `origin_mode` (String) Origin mode: 
default: Origin with user request protocol and port 
http: Origin with http protocol on port 80 
https: Origin with https protocol on port 443 
custom: Origin with custom protocol(ori_https) and port(port) 
Default value is default when not specified.
- `port` (Number) This value needs to be set when origin_mode=custom. 
Origin port, valid value range (1-65535).


<a id="nestedblock--config--origin_host"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.origin_host`

Required:

- `host` (String) Origin HOST


<a id="nestedblock--config--rate_limit"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.rate_limit`

Required:

- `max_rate_count` (Number) Required field, rate limit value

Optional:

- `leading_flow_count` (Number) Required field, how many bytes at the beginning are not rate limited
- `leading_flow_unit` (String) Required field, unit for how many bytes at the beginning are not rate limited
- `max_rate_unit` (String) Required field, rate limit unit


<a id="nestedblock--config--referer"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.referer`

Required:

- `list` (List of String) Referer list, maximum 200 entries, multiple separated by commas; regex not supported; for wildcard domains, start with *, e.g.: *.example2.com, including any matching host headers and empty host headers.
- `type` (Number) Anti-hotlinking type: 
1: referer blacklist 
2: referer whitelist

Optional:

- `allow_empty` (Boolean) Whether to allow empty referer, default value is true, optional parameters: true,false


<a id="nestedblock--config--speed_limit"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.speed_limit`

Required:

- `begin_time` (String) Speed limit effective start time, format HH:ii, e.g. (08:30) 24-hour format
- `end_time` (String) Speed limit effective end time, format HH:ii, e.g. (08:30) 24-hour format
- `pattern` (String) URL matching rules, multiple separated by commas, e.g.: 
When type=all: only supports .* 
When type=ext: jpg,png,gif 
When type=dir: /product/index,/test/index,/user/index 
When type=route: /index.html,/test/*.jpg,/user/get?index 
When type=regex: set the corresponding regex, after setting regex, match the request URL against the regex, if matched then use this speed limit rule.
- `speed` (String) Speed limit value, unit Kbps, actual effect will be converted to KB

Optional:

- `type` (String) URL matching type,
ext: file extension,
dir: directory,
route: full path matching,
regex: regular expression,
all: all


<a id="nestedblock--config--timeout"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.timeout`

Required:

- `time` (String) Required field, timeout duration, unit s, value range: [5-300]
